products.name: Baobal Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 600 250ml ksh 900 500ml ksh 1250 1L ksh 2200 BENEFITS • Rich with Vitamin E and fatty acids to moisturize skin & scalp. • Provide a barrier to protect from environmental elements. • Protect collagen to ensure skin elasticity and prevent sagging, wrinkles and fine lines. • Gentle oil cleanser. Massage a few drops on skin to strip down oils and makeup to open up pores before using your regular cleanser. • Fights acne. It is lightweight non comedogenic oil perfect for oily skin to moisturize without causing breakouts. • Nourishes & moisturize hair & scalp to prevent frizz, breakage and dryness. • Soother inflammation & eczema. Baobab oil is a rich source of omega fatty acids that fight inflammation, making it an excellent choice for sensitive or inflamed skin.

products.name: Avocado Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 550 250ml ksh 700 500ml ksh 1100 1L ksh 1500 BENEFITS • Skin moisturizer. Avocado oil is a good source of vitamin E, potassium and lecithin. Naturally, the moisturizing elements of the oil improve the dry and rough texture of the skin. It also helps the skin to rejuvenate. • Helps prevent acne. It helps to reduce acne inflammation and treats it within a short period of time. It also provides ultimate hydration to your skin without leaving any oil residue. • Treats sunburn. It is packed with vitamin E, D, protein and lecithin that help boost healing, which helps in treating sunburned skin. Our avocado oil eases the symptoms of sunburn such as redness, skin irritation etc. • Slow down signs of aging. Avocado oil contains essential fatty acids and oleic acid that promotes collagen synthesis in your skin. • Help with eczema & psoriasis. Being antioxidant-rich and filled with vitamins, avocado oil can be extremely useful for dry and flaky skin. Eczema and psoriasis both make your skin irritated, itchy and flaky. Avocado oil can soothe irritated skin, hydrate it and reduce the symptoms of these skin conditions. •Moisturize scalp & nails. Avocado oil improves brittle and dry nails. It keeps the skin around your nails soft and prevents nail breakage. If used as a hair mask, it can help with dandruff issues as well. Your scalp feels moisturized and well-nourished after an avocado mask application. • Smoothen, soften & strengthen hair. Avocado oil's emollience helps to optimally hydrate hair while potassium and magnesium (two minerals found in avocado oil) lock in moisture. The result is improved hair texture with a shine boost. • Protect & repair hair. Avocado oil helps improve overall hair health as it contains natural fatty acids that help to repair the hair cuticle and prevent breakage. AND - due to its ability to hydrate hair and lock in moisture, it can also help prevent heat styling damage.

products.name: Blackseed Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 700 250ml ksh 950 500ml ksh 1300 1L ksh 2100 BENEFITS • Skin conditions. Due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, black seed oil may help reduce symptoms of dermatological conditions like psoriasis, eczema, vitiligo and acne. • Wound healing & skin repair. Due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, Black seed oil can also stimulate the production of collagen, speeding up the skin's healing process. • Hair health. Black seed oil may help reduce scalp conditions like a dry, flaky scalp. • Revitalize skin. With vitamins A, B, and C aplenty, this oil also helps the skin retain moisture, and thanks to an abundance of fatty acids, it may also help to smoothen out the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. • Even out skin tone. Together the vitamin A, amino acids, and fatty acids in black seed oil work together to hydrate skin cells. This is because vitamin A has the ability to increase epidermal turnover (aka the generation of the skin cells). • Manage hair loss. Studies have found that a hair treatment containing black seed oil resulted in a reduction in hair fallout of up to 76%.

products.name: Aloe Vera Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 550 250ml ksh 800 500ml ksh 1300 1L ksh 2000 BENEFITS • Soothe skin inflammation. • Fades acne, acne scars and blemishes. • Boost hair growth. • Nourishes dry flaky scalp. • Promote shiny healthy hair. • Treat fungal infections on skin and scalp. • Even skin tone. • Hydrate skin & slow aging. • Fade stretchmarks.

products.name: Grapeseed Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 800 250ml ksh 1100 500ml ksh 1600 1L ksh 2500 BENEFITS For Skin: • Moisturizer: Grapeseed oil is easily absorbed and makes an excellent natural moisturizer for all skin types. It helps maintain skin hydration without leaving a greasy residue. • Antioxidant Properties: It's rich in antioxidants, including vitamin E and proanthocyanidins, which can protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and UV radiation, potentially slowing the signs of aging. •Anti-Inflammatory: Grapeseed oil has anti-inflammatory properties and can help soothe irritated or sensitive skin. It's useful for conditions like eczema and psoriasis. • Acne Control: Due to its non-comedogenic nature, it can be applied to acne-prone skin to help regulate oil production and prevent clogged pores. •Scar Reduction: Grapeseed oil assists in reducing the appearance of scars, stretch marks, and blemishes, promoting skin regeneration. • Skin Tightening: Some people use grapeseed oil to tighten and tone the skin. Its astringent properties can enhance skin firmness and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. For Hair: • Hair Moisturization: Grapeseed oil can be applied to dry or frizzy hair to provide moisture and shine without weighing the hair down. It's a great option for those with fine or thin hair. •Strengthening: The oil contains linoleic acid, which can strengthen hair and help prevent breakage. It's especially useful for people with fragile or damaged hair. • Dandruff Control: Grapeseed oil can be massaged into the scalp to help control dandruff and alleviate an itchy, flaky scalp. • Heat Protectant: It serves as a natural heat protectant when applied to the hair before using heat styling tools like hairdryers and straighteners. •Split End Treatment: Grapeseed oil can be used to reduce the appearance of split ends and maintain hair health. • Natural Conditioner: It can be used as a leave-in conditioner to make hair softer, smoother, and more manageable.

products.name: Moringa Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 950 250ml ksh 1300 500ml ksh 2300 1L ksh 3500 BENEFITS For Skin: • Moisturization: Moringa oil is a lightweight and easily absorbed oil that provides deep hydration to the skin, making it an excellent natural moisturizer for all skin types. • Antioxidant Properties: It's rich in antioxidants, such as vitamins A, C, and E, which help protect the skin from damage by free radicals and UV radiation, potentially slowing down the signs of aging. •Anti-Inflammatory: Moringa oil contains anti-inflammatory compounds that can soothe and calm irritated or sensitive skin. It's beneficial for conditions like eczema and psoriasis. •Acne Control: Due to its non-comedogenic nature, moringa oil can be applied to acne-prone skin to help regulate oil production and prevent clogged pores, making it a suitable oil for those with acne. •Wound Healing: Moringa oil may promote wound healing and reduce the appearance of scars. It supports skin regeneration and may help minimize the visibility of scars and blemishes. • Skin Toning: It's used for skin toning and can help improve skin's overall texture and firmness, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. For Hair: • Hair Moisturization: Moringa oil can be used to moisturize and condition the hair, providing shine and reducing frizz. It's especially beneficial for dry or brittle hair. • Strength and Growth: Moringa oil contains essential nutrients that help strengthen hair and promote hair growth. It can reduce breakage and support the health of hair follicles. •Dandruff Control: It can be applied to the scalp to help alleviate dandruff and dryness. Its antifungal and antimicrobial properties can maintain a healthy scalp. • Natural Shine: Moringa oil gives hair a natural shine and smoothness without being heavy or greasy. • Protective Barrier: When used as a leave-in treatment, it forms a protective barrier that shields the hair from environmental pollutants and heat damage.

products.name: Amla Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 700 250ml ksh 1100 500ml ksh 2100 1L ksh 3000 BENEFITS • Prevents Gray Hair: Amla hair oil can prevent premature graying of hair by reducing oxidative stress that ages hair follicles faster. • Natural Hair Conditioner: Amla hair oil has fatty acids which can help moisturise and nourish dry hair, tame frizz, reduce hair fall and breakage of hair. • Soothing Effect: Amla oil can help soothe dry, irritated scalp. It helps to reduce itching by giving a cooling effect to the scalp. • Protects and Strengthens Hair: Amla hair oil can strengthen your hair by protecting them from environmental damage. • Boosts hair density: Use of amla oil for hair growth reduces hair loss and regulates better growth. • Amla oil improves the thickness and volume of your hair. Amla oil overall improves the hair texture and density. • Controls dandruff: If you have an oily scalp, amla oil helps to mildly exfoliate the scalp and absorb all the excess oil, thus controlling the dandruff. • Treats Lice: With no side effects it is an effective hair oil for treating head lice on children. Simply apply oil, leave it for an hour and then comb through. • Scalp Cleanser: Amla hair oil naturally cleanses the scalp. The antioxidants in amla protect your scalp from damage caused by dirt, dust, smoke and styling tools. • Nourishing: Amla Hair Oil is rich in vitamin C and other essential nutrients that help to improve the condition of hair.

products.name: Apricot Kernel Oil
products.description: 100ml ksh 500 250ml ksh 700 500ml ksh 1000 1L ksh 1700 BENEFITS • Brighten skin tone. Apricot oil is a good source of vitamins C and E, and these antioxidants help boost the skin cell turnover, promoting a brighter complexion and even tone. • Moisturize skin. Since it is a good source of vitamin A and other fatty acids, the oil can strengthen the skin barrier, improve its texture, and restore damaged skin. • Prevent acne & inflammation. Apricot oil has antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. It is effective to ease the symptoms of conditions like eczema and psoriasis. • Reduce signs of aging. It is a source of vitamin A that may help minimize the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines, rebuild collagen, and tighten the skin and also protect your skin from further UV damage. USES: • Soap Making. • Massage oils & body oils. Mix 10 drops of any essential oil with 60 mL of apricot oil. Store the mix in a glass jar. Use it three times a week. • Oil cleanser. Mix a few drops of essential oils and 20mL of apricot oil. Massage your skin with the oil blend. Leave it on for 20 minutes and then rinse it off. Use it three times a week. • Sealant. After finishing your skin care routine, massage your face with 2-3 drops of apricot oil.

products.name: Jamaican Black Castor Oil
products.description: 120ml ksh 700 250ml ksh 950 500ml ksh 1400 1L ksh 2100 BENEFITS For Skin: •Moisturizer: JBCO is a thick and rich oil that provides deep hydration to the skin. It's beneficial for dry or rough skin and can help improve overall skin moisture. • Anti-Inflammatory: The oil contains ricinoleic acid, which has anti-inflammatory properties. It can be used to soothe irritated skin, reduce redness, and alleviate minor skin issues like rashes or sunburn. • Anti-Acne: JBCO's antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties may help in managing acne by preventing bacterial growth and reducing inflammation. It can be used as a spot treatment. • Scar Reduction: Some people use JBCO to reduce the appearance of scars and stretch marks. The oil's nourishing and hydrating properties may support skin repair and regeneration. • Natural Cleanser: JBCO can be used as a natural cleanser or makeup remover. Its thick consistency can effectively remove makeup and impurities from the skin. For Hair: •Hair Growth: JBCO is widely recognized for its potential to promote hair growth. It strengthens hair follicles, prevents hair breakage, and may lead to longer and healthier hair when applied to the scalp. •Thicker Hair: The oil's nutrients and omega-9 fatty acids can help make hair strands thicker and more resilient. It's often used in hair care routines to achieve fuller and more voluminous hair. •Dandruff Control: JBCO can be applied to the scalp to control dandruff and flaky scalp conditions. Its antifungal properties help maintain a healthy scalp. •Split End Treatment: It can be used to treat and prevent split ends, helping maintain the overall health and appearance of hair. • Sealant for Moisture: JBCO is often used as a sealant in the "LOC" (Liquid, Oil, Cream) method for curly and coily hair types. It locks in moisture, keeping hair hydrated and preventing dryness. •Hot Oil Treatment: JBCO can be used in hot oil treatments to condition and revitalize damaged or dry hair.

products.name: Clove Essential Oil
products.description: 10ml. Ksh 470 30ml. Ksh 1050 100ml. Ksh 1700 BENEFITS •Acne treatment. Clove oil has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential natural remedy for acne. Diluted clove oil can be applied topically to treat acne blemishes. • Skin Infections: Its antimicrobial properties make clove oil useful for treating various skin infections, such as fungal infections or cuts and wounds. • Skin Rejuvenation: The antioxidant properties of clove oil can help combat free radicals and promote healthier, more youthful-looking skin. •Anti-Aging: Clove oil's antioxidant content may help reduce the signs of aging, such as wrinkles and fine lines. • Skin Irritations: It can provide relief from skin irritations and itchiness, particularly when diluted and applied to the affected areas. •Promotes Hair Growth: Clove oil can improve blood circulation to the scalp, which may promote hair growth. It's often used in hair care products for this purpose. •Dandruff Treatment: Clove oil's antimicrobial properties can help combat dandruff and flaky scalp conditions. It can be added to your regular shampoo or diluted in a carrier oil and massaged onto the scalp. •Hair Conditioning: When diluted with a carrier oil, clove oil can serve as a hair conditioner. It helps with frizz and improve the overall texture of your hair.
